sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f formula: Position_Size = Worst_Possible_Loss / |f|. Divide maximum drawdown by negative f value to determine dollar amount per unit of f during backtesting. f is tested incrementally across range to find optimal fractional allocation.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by dividing the worst possible loss outcome by the negative optimal f value to establish the dollar amount per unit of f tested.
